name: The Kent Law Firm
description_short: The Kent Law Firm is a credit building provider based in Atlanta, Georgia. Rated 5.0/5 with 155 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
The Kent Law Firm is a credit building provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. With 155 Google reviews and a 5.0/5.0 rating, The Kent Law Firm has built a significant presence in the local credit building market.

Operating as a bankruptcy service, The Kent Law Firm provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit building solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Credit building services like The Kent Law Firm in Atlanta help consumers who are starting fresh or recovering from credit setbacks. The most effective credit building programs report to all three major credit bureaus and provide tools to track progress over time. When comparing providers, look for transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and verified reporting to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering The Kent Law Firm should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit building provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
